author: agenticbranduniverse.com/registry
description: A short narrated life-or-work story in chapters. The first TEXT-DOMINANT projection: its primary output is prose written for the ear, with art and audio as secondary slots.

slots.note: PRIMARY slot and it is prose, not an image. Every other projection in this universe has an image as its primary output.

perSlot.id: written for the EAR: short sentences, no construction a mouth would refuse
no invented biographical fact; every claim traces to supplied source material

crossSlot.id: one consistent narrative voice across every chapter
crossSlot.against: the first locked chapter as the voice of record

crossSlot.id: the subject's likeness holds across every chapter-art slot
crossSlot.scope: all chapter-art slots binding the same character

crossSlot.id: chapters are chronologically coherent and do not contradict each other

notes: Subject-approval gated: a biography of a real person is not shippable on an agent's say-so.
